items.title: Microbiome and metabolites impact enteric and central nervous systems in ALS.
items.summary: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) has been linked to gastrointestinal symptoms and alterations in the gut microbiota. The enteric nervous system (ENS) coordinates intestinal function and sits at the host-microbe interface. The mechanisms by which luminal changes relay to the central nervous system (CNS), where motor neurons reside, have yet to be completely defined. In this narrative review, we first present evidence from ALS patient cohorts and preclinical models alongside mechanistic studies of infection, dysbiosis, and related neurodegenerative diseases to discuss how the microbiota and its metabolites may affect the ENS and CNS in ALS. Next, we propose a plausible mechanism of ALS pathogenesis through the gut-microbiome-brain axis. We further offer a summary of clinical trials that have studied the impacts of the microbiota on human ALS. Finally, we discuss future directions for studies of microbiota-ENS-CNS interactions in ALS. Better understanding of the dynamic interactions among the microbiota, microbial metabolites, neuroactive metabolites, and inflammation through the ENS/CNS in ALS will provide innovative insights into ALS prevention and treatment.
items.titleZh: 微生物组和代谢物影响ALS中的肠道和中枢神经系统
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述总结了ALS患者和动物模型中肠道微生物群及其代谢物如何通过肠-微生物组-脑轴影响肠道神经系统和中枢神经系统，并梳理了相关临床试验，提出未来研究方向。
items.insight: 该综述系统整合了微生物组、代谢物与ALS神经病理之间的关联，为ALS研究者提供了从肠道到大脑的机制框架，并指出了尚未解决的临床转化问题。

aiRead.keyFinding: 微生物群及其代谢物可能通过肠-微生物组-脑轴影响ALS中的肠道和中枢神经系统，但具体机制尚未完全明确。
aiRead.limitation: 作为叙述性综述，未进行系统性文献检索或定量分析，结论基于现有研究的整合。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注针对微生物群调节的ALS临床试验结果，以及微生物代谢物（如短链脂肪酸）在ENS-CNS轴中的具体作用机制研究。

items.abstractZh: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）与胃肠道症状和肠道微生物群改变有关。肠道神经系统（ENS）协调肠道功能，并位于宿主-微生物界面。管腔变化如何传递到运动神经元所在的中枢神经系统（CNS）的机制尚未完全明确。在这篇叙述性综述中，我们首先呈现来自ALS患者队列和临床前模型的证据，以及感染、菌群失调和相关神经退行性疾病的机制研究，以讨论微生物群及其代谢物如何影响ALS中的ENS和CNS。接着，我们通过肠-微生物组-脑轴提出了一种ALS发病机制的合理机制。我们进一步总结了研究微生物群对人类ALS影响的临床试验。最后，我们讨论了ALS中微生物群-ENS-CNS相互作用研究的未来方向。更好地理解ALS中微生物群、微生物代谢物、神经活性代谢物和炎症通过ENS/CNS的动态相互作用，将为ALS的预防和治疗提供创新见解。
items.frontierRationale: 该综述发表于2026年，整合了最新的ALS患者队列和临床前研究，聚焦于肠-微生物组-脑轴这一新兴领域，具有高度的ALS相关性和转化价值。

items.title: Persistent deficits in the motor unit following mono and dual administration of SMN up-regulators in the SmnΔ7 mouse model of spinal muscular atrophy.
items.summary: Spinal muscular atrophy (SMA) is characterized by motor neuron loss and neuromuscular junction (NMJ) pathology. Although SMN-upregulating therapies such as Nusinersen markedly improve survival and motor function for many patients, impactful deficits often remain. In order to generate the next generation of therapy for SMA, it is critical that we understand the cellular basis for persistent deficits and find strategies to support and promote motor unit repair. Here we performed a detailed temporal analysis of the distal motor unit following administration of the Smn up-regulator Nusinersen in a range of differentially vulnerable cranial muscles in the SmnΔ7 mouse model. We show that early administration of Nusinersen facilitates progressive recovery of motor endplate innervation, even in the most vulnerable muscles. However, there is a persistent decrease in intramuscular motor axon number and increase in motor unit size, which is most severe in the most vulnerable muscles. We further show that combining Nusinersen with the Risdiplam tool compound SMN-C8 leads to a synergistic increase in Smn levels but does not produce broad improvements in motor unit recovery beyond those achieved with Nusinersen alone. Nevertheless, dual therapy resulted in significant improvement in hindlimb splay score from post-natal day 10 onwards. These effects suggest that enhanced SMN restoration may confer selective functional and structural benefits, although these were insufficient to fully rescue persistent motor unit pathology. Collectively, our findings demonstrate that early Smn restoration enables robust NMJ reinnervation but fails to prevent axon loss and motor unit remodelling. The limited additional benefit observed with dual SMN up-regulation, despite synergistic increases in Smn levels, suggests a potential ceiling effect for SMN-dependent rescue and highlights the need for adjunctive SMN-independent strategies aimed at preserving axons, stabilizing motor units, and promoting neuromuscular regeneration in SMA.
items.titleZh: 脊髓性肌萎缩症SmnΔ7小鼠模型中单次和联合使用SMN上调剂后运动单位的持续性缺陷
items.summaryZh: 在SMA小鼠模型中，早期使用Nusinersen可促进神经肌肉接头恢复，但无法阻止轴突丢失和运动单位重塑；联合使用Risdiplam虽能协同提高SMN蛋白水平，但并未显著改善运动单位病理，提示SMN上调疗法存在疗效上限。
items.insight: 该研究揭示了SMN上调疗法在SMA中的局限性——即使早期干预也无法完全修复运动单位，这为ALS等神经退行性疾病中运动单位损伤的修复策略提供了重要参考，提示需要开发SMN非依赖性辅助疗法。

aiRead.keyFinding: 早期Nusinersen治疗可恢复神经肌肉接头神经支配，但无法阻止轴突丢失和运动单位重塑；联合Risdiplam虽协同提高SMN水平，但未显著改善运动单位病理。
aiRead.limitation: 研究基于SMA小鼠模型，结果向ALS等疾病的直接外推需谨慎；未评估长期功能结局或非运动系统影响。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注后续研究是否探索SMN非依赖性策略（如轴突保护或神经营养因子）在SMA及ALS模型中的效果。

items.abstractZh: 脊髓性肌萎缩症（SMA）的特征是运动神经元丢失和神经肌肉接头（NMJ）病理。尽管Nusinersen等SMN上调疗法显著改善了许多患者的生存和运动功能，但仍有显著缺陷持续存在。为了开发下一代SMA疗法，理解持续性缺陷的细胞基础并寻找支持和促进运动单位修复的策略至关重要。本研究在SmnΔ7小鼠模型中，对一系列不同易损性的颅肌施用Smn上调剂Nusinersen后，对远端运动单位进行了详细的时间分析。结果显示，早期施用Nusinersen促进了运动终板神经支配的逐步恢复，即使在最易损的肌肉中也是如此。然而，肌内运动轴突数量持续减少，运动单位大小增加，这在最易损的肌肉中最为严重。进一步发现，将Nusinersen与Risdiplam工具化合物SMN-C8联合使用可协同增加Smn水平，但并未在运动单位恢复方面产生比单独使用Nusinersen更广泛的改善。尽管如此，联合治疗从出生后第10天起显著改善了后肢张开评分。这些效应表明，增强的SMN恢复可能带来选择性的功能和结构益处，尽管这些不足以完全挽救持续的运动单位病理。总之，我们的发现表明，早期Smn恢复能够实现强大的NMJ再神经支配，但未能防止轴突丢失和运动单位重塑。尽管Smn水平协同增加，但联合SMN上调观察到的额外益处有限，提示SMN依赖性挽救可能存在天花板效应，并强调了在SMA中需要辅助性的SMN非依赖性策略，以保护轴突、稳定运动单位并促进神经肌肉再生。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究发表于2026年，聚焦SMA模型中对当前临床标准疗法（Nusinersen）的持续性缺陷进行机制解析，并探索联合用药的局限性，具有直接的ALS转化相关性。

items.title: Programmed axon degeneration gene variants in human disease.
items.summary: Programmed axon degeneration (PAD; also known as Wallerian degeneration) is a conserved pathway controlling axon breakdown following injury or metabolic stress. PAD is driven by the depletion of nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide (NAD) through loss of the pro-survival enzyme NMNAT2 and activation of the pro-degenerative NADase SARM1. Recent genetic studies have identified pathogenic variants in PAD pathway enzymes associated with severe neurodegenerative phenotypes. Pathogenic variants in NAMPT, NMNAT1, NMNAT2, and SARM1 have been identified and will be discussed in this review. NAMPT variants cause sensory and motor neuropathy with neurodevelopmental symptoms. NMNAT1 variants are well-characterized causes of Leber Congenital Amaurosis type 9, while NMNAT2 variants result in peripheral neuropathies with childhood onset. SARM1 gain-of-function variants with constitutively active NADase activity are enriched in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis patients. These findings demonstrate that maintaining proper NAD homeostasis is crucial for axon survival, and disruption through genetic variants leads to distinct neurodegenerative outcomes. Understanding these rare variants provides insight into PAD mechanisms and supports development of broad-spectrum neuroprotective therapies targeting this pathway. Current therapeutic approaches include SARM1 inhibitors in clinical trials, gene therapy, and NAD precursor supplementation, offering hope for treating multiple neurodegenerative diseases.
items.titleZh: 人类疾病中的程序性轴突退化基因变异
items.summaryZh: 程序性轴突退化（PAD）通路中的基因变异（NAMPT、NMNAT1、NMNAT2、SARM1）与多种神经退行性疾病相关，其中SARM1功能获得性变异在ALS患者中富集。维持NAD稳态对轴突存活至关重要，靶向该通路的疗法（如SARM1抑制剂）正在开发中。
items.insight: 该综述系统总结了PAD通路基因变异与人类疾病（包括ALS）的关联，强调了SARM1作为治疗靶点的潜力，为ALS研究者提供了从罕见遗传变异到通用神经保护策略的转化思路。

aiRead.keyFinding: SARM1功能获得性变异在ALS患者中富集，PAD通路基因变异通过破坏NAD稳态导致神经退行性表型。
aiRead.limitation: 作为综述，未提供原始实验数据，依赖已发表研究，可能遗漏未报道的变异。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注SARM1抑制剂在ALS临床试验中的进展，以及NAD前体补充疗法的临床结果。

items.abstractZh: 程序性轴突退化（PAD；也称为沃勒变性）是一条保守的通路，控制损伤或代谢应激后的轴突分解。PAD由烟酰胺腺嘌呤二核苷酸（NAD）的耗竭驱动，通过丢失促存活酶NMNAT2和激活促退化NAD酶SARM1实现。最近的遗传学研究已鉴定出与严重神经退行性表型相关的PAD通路酶致病性变异。本综述讨论了NAMPT、NMNAT1、NMNAT2和SARM1中已鉴定的致病性变异。NAMPT变异导致伴有神经发育症状的感觉和运动神经病变。NMNAT1变异是Leber先天性黑矇9型的明确病因，而NMNAT2变异导致儿童期发病的周围神经病变。具有组成性活性NAD酶活性的SARM1功能获得性变异在肌萎缩侧索硬化症患者中富集。这些发现表明，维持适当的NAD稳态对轴突存活至关重要，而通过遗传变异破坏该稳态会导致不同的神经退行性结局。理解这些罕见变异为PAD机制提供了见解，并支持开发针对该通路的广谱神经保护疗法。目前的治疗方法包括临床试验中的SARM1抑制剂、基因治疗和NAD前体补充，为治疗多种神经退行性疾病带来了希望。
items.frontierRationale: 该综述发表于2026年，整合了最新的PAD通路基因变异研究，直接关联ALS中SARM1功能获得性变异，具有高度的ALS相关性和转化价值。

items.title: Multiplex Panel Detects Glial and Inflammatory Biomarker Signatures in Sporadic and C9orf72-ALS.
items.summary: CSF proteomics has emerged as a valuable strategy for identifying diagnostic and prognostic biomarkers in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS). However, the limited availability and volumes of CSF samples restrict the broader clinical application of CSF-based biomarker panels. To address this challenge, we investigated whether the novel nucleic acid-linked immuno-sandwich assay (NULISA) multiplex platform-capable of quantifying multiple neural, glial, and inflammatory markers from minimal biofluid volumes-could validate previously proposed biomarkers and identify additional candidates relevant to ALS. Using this platform, we measured a targeted panel of 131 biomarkers in cohorts of patients with C9orf72-associated ALS, sporadic ALS (sALS), and matched healthy controls. The 6 markers neurofilament heavy chain (NEFH) and neurofilament light chain (NEFL), chitinases-particularly chitotriosidase-1 (CHIT1) and chitinase-3-like protein-1 (CHI3L1), and chemokines CCL2 and CCL3 were significantly elevated in both ALS groups compared with controls. These biomarkers correlated with disease progression and demonstrated strong diagnostic performance when combined into aggregate scores, as reflected by a high area under the receiver operating characteristic curve for ALS. Notably, C9orf72-ALS patients exhibited higher levels of the oxidative stress-related markers PRDX6 and ENO2, compared with sALS patients, suggesting a genotype-specific molecular signature. Overall, our findings support the use of a multiplexed panel of diverse, inflammatory, glial, and neurodegeneration-associated biomarkers as a complementary diagnostic and prognostic tool alongside established measurements of neurofilaments. This approach may enhance biomarker robustness while minimizing CSF volume requirements, thereby improving clinical feasibility in ALS research and care.
items.titleZh: 多重检测面板检测散发性与C9orf72-ALS中的胶质和炎症生物标志物特征
items.summaryZh: 本研究利用NULISA多重平台，在少量脑脊液中同时检测131种生物标志物，发现NEFL、NEFH、CHIT1、CHI3L1、CCL2和CCL3在ALS患者中显著升高，且C9orf72-ALS患者有独特的氧化应激标志物特征。
items.insight: 该研究展示了NULISA平台在ALS生物标志物发现中的潜力，特别是其低样本量需求和高通量能力，为临床转化提供了新工具；同时，C9orf72-ALS特有的氧化应激标志物提示了基因型特异性病理机制，值得进一步探索。

aiRead.studyType: 观察性临床研究（病例对照）
aiRead.keyFinding: NULISA平台可检测ALS患者脑脊液中升高的神经丝、几丁质酶和趋化因子，且C9orf72-ALS患者有独特的氧化应激标志物特征。
aiRead.limitation: 样本量相对较小，且为横断面设计，缺乏纵向验证；NULISA平台的临床标准化和成本效益仍需进一步评估。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注该平台在更大队列中的纵向验证研究，以及针对C9orf72-ALS氧化应激标志物的机制性研究。

items.abstractZh: 脑脊液蛋白质组学已成为识别肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）诊断和预后生物标志物的重要策略。然而，脑脊液样本的有限可用性和体积限制了基于脑脊液的生物标志物面板的更广泛临床应用。为应对这一挑战，我们研究了新型核酸连接免疫三明治检测（NULISA）多重平台——该平台能够从极少量生物体液中定量多种神经、胶质和炎症标志物——是否能够验证先前提出的生物标志物并识别与ALS相关的其他候选标志物。利用该平台，我们在C9orf72相关ALS患者、散发性ALS（sALS）患者和匹配的健康对照组队列中测量了131种生物标志物的靶向面板。与对照组相比，两种ALS组的6种标志物——神经丝重链（NEFH）和神经丝轻链（NEFL）、几丁质酶（特别是壳三糖苷酶-1（CHIT1）和几丁质酶-3样蛋白-1（CHI3L1））以及趋化因子CCL2和CCL3——均显著升高。这些生物标志物与疾病进展相关，并在组合成综合评分时表现出强大的诊断性能，如ALS的受试者工作特征曲线下面积较高所示。值得注意的是，与sALS患者相比，C9orf72-ALS患者表现出更高水平的氧化应激相关标志物PRDX6和ENO2，提示存在基因型特异性分子特征。总体而言，我们的研究结果支持使用包含多种炎症、胶质和神经退行性相关生物标志物的多重面板，作为神经丝已建立测量的补充诊断和预后工具。该方法可在最小化脑脊液体积需求的同时增强生物标志物的稳健性，从而提高ALS研究和护理的临床可行性。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究利用2024年新近开发的NULISA多重平台，在极小脑脊液体积中同时定量131种标志物，直接解决了ALS生物标志物临床转化的关键瓶颈，具有高度ALS相关性和转化价值。

items.title: Are T1-weighted and T2-weighted volumetric pipelines interchangeable methodologies for investigating amyotrophic lateral sclerosis pathology in vivo?
items.summary: To test the hypothesis that T1-w and T2-w volumetric pipelines are not interchangeable, particularly regarding their differential sensitivity to physiological traits and disease effects in the red nucleus (RN) and substantia nigra (SN). Thirty-one patients with ALS (mean age: 59.39 ± 8.73 years; 23 males) and 21 non-neurodegenerative controls (mean age: 53.43 ± 10.01 years; 16 males). Bilateral RN and SN volumes were automatically extracted using deep learning pipelines optimized for T1-w (OpenMAP-T1) and T2-w (pBrain) images. Volumes were normalized to total intracranial volume. A 2 × 2 × 2 repeated-measures general linear model (GLM) assessed interactions between Method, Region, Side, and Group, controlling for age, sex, BMI, and handedness. There was no significant main effect of the disease group (p = 0.829) or Method × Group interaction (p = 0.682), indicating both pipelines agreed on the absence of disease-specific macrostructural atrophy. However, a significant four-way Method × Region × Side × Age interaction (P = 0.031) was observed. In the RN, the T2-w pipeline detected robust age-related atrophy (Left: Slope = -1.84 × 10 -6 ; Right: Slope = -1.70 ×10⁻⁶), whereas the T1-w pipeline did not (p > 0.05). Conversely, in the SN, T1-w consistently identified bilateral age-related loss, whereas T2-w yielded lateralized results (Right: p = 0.011; Left: P = 0.465). T1-w and T2-w pipelines are not interchangeable. Though both confirm the absence of gross atrophy in this ALS cohort, their differing sensitivity to physiological aging highlights their distinct biological tissue properties, requiring method-specific interpretation.
items.titleZh: T1加权与T2加权体积分析流程在肌萎缩侧索硬化症体内病理研究中的可互换性探讨
items.summaryZh: 本研究比较了T1加权和T2加权MRI体积分析流程在ALS患者红核和黑质中的表现。两种方法均未发现ALS特异性萎缩，但对年龄相关变化的敏感性不同：T2加权在红核更敏感，T1加权在黑质更敏感。这表明两种流程不可互换，需根据研究目标选择。
items.insight: 该研究为ALS影像学生物标志物选择提供了关键方法学警示：不同MRI序列的体积分析流程对脑干核团（如红核、黑质）的敏感性差异显著，可能影响疾病进展或治疗反应的解读。研究者需根据目标区域谨慎选择流程，避免因方法学差异导致假阴性或假阳性结论。

aiRead.studyType: 观察性临床研究（横断面设计）
aiRead.keyFinding: T1和T2加权体积分析流程在ALS患者红核和黑质中均未检测到疾病特异性萎缩，但对年龄相关变化的敏感性不同，表明两者不可互换。
aiRead.limitation: 样本量较小（31例ALS患者），且未纳入纵向数据或病理验证，无法评估流程对疾病进展的敏感性。
aiRead.watchNext: 后续研究应扩大样本量，结合纵向随访和尸检验证，明确不同MRI序列体积分析在ALS亚型或不同疾病阶段的适用性。

items.abstractZh: 为检验T1加权（T1-w）和T2加权（T2-w）体积分析流程在红核（RN）和黑质（SN）中对生理特征和疾病效应的敏感性差异是否不可互换。纳入31例ALS患者（平均年龄：59.39±8.73岁；23名男性）和21名非神经退行性对照组（平均年龄：53.43±10.01岁；16名男性）。使用针对T1-w（OpenMAP-T1）和T2-w（pBrain）优化的深度学习流程自动提取双侧RN和SN体积，并标准化至总颅内体积。采用2×2×2重复测量一般线性模型（GLM）评估方法、区域、侧别和组别之间的交互作用，控制年龄、性别、BMI和惯用手。未发现疾病组的主效应显著（p=0.829）或方法×组别交互作用显著（p=0.682），表明两种流程均一致显示无疾病特异性宏观结构萎缩。然而，观察到显著的四向方法×区域×侧别×年龄交互作用（p=0.031）。在RN中，T2-w流程检测到稳健的年龄相关萎缩（左侧：斜率=-1.84×10⁻⁶；右侧：斜率=-1.70×10⁻⁶），而T1-w流程未检测到（p>0.05）。相反，在SN中，T1-w一致识别出双侧年龄相关损失，而T2-w产生侧化结果（右侧：p=0.011；左侧：p=0.465）。T1-w和T2-w流程不可互换。尽管两者均确认该ALS队列中无大体萎缩，但它们对生理性衰老的不同敏感性凸显了其不同的生物组织特性，需要方法特异性解释。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究近期揭示了T1和T2加权体积分析在ALS相关脑干核团中的不可互换性，强调了方法学选择对转化研究准确性的关键影响。

items.title: Cholesterol in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis: a bystander, a biomarker, or a target?
items.summary: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) is a fatal neurodegenerative disorder characterized by progressive motor neuron loss. In addition to the different pathogenic mechanisms, in recent years, increasing attention has been directed toward the role of lipid metabolism in ALS pathogenesis, although the clinical relevance of lipid alterations in ALS may differ from their well-established role in cardiovascular disease. This review critically examines the multifactorial relationship between cholesterol and ALS through three perspectives: (1) as a risk factor for disease onset, (2) as a prognostic biomarker of disease progression, and (3) as a potential therapeutic target. Epidemiological and genetic studies suggest a complex and sometimes contradictory association between lipid profile and ALS risk. Elevated LDL-cholesterol and total cholesterol have been linked to increased disease susceptibility in some cohorts, with Mendelian randomization studies supporting a potential causal role. Conversely, evidence regarding HDL-cholesterol remains conflicting and may be influenced by sex-specific and metabolic factors. As a prognostic biomarker, hyperlipidemia has been variably associated with prolonged survival in ALS patients; however, these findings often lose significance after adjusting for body mass index and nutritional status, suggesting that lipid levels may reflect systemic metabolic reserve rather than directly modulating disease progression. Pharmacological modulation of cholesterol reveals further complexity. While statins are generally not associated with increased ALS risk in clinical studies, preclinical models show divergent effects: some statins accelerate disease progression, while others like lovastatin may be protective. Other lipid-lowering drugs, including fibrates and PCSK9 inhibitors, may also influence ALS-related pathways beyond cholesterol lowering, although their potential role remains to be clarified.
items.titleZh: 胆固醇在肌萎缩侧索硬化症中的作用：旁观者、生物标志物还是治疗靶点？
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述系统分析了胆固醇在ALS中的三重角色：作为发病风险因素、预后生物标志物和潜在治疗靶点。流行病学和遗传学证据显示，LDL和总胆固醇升高可能增加ALS风险，但HDL的作用存在争议。高脂血症与ALS患者生存期延长的关联在调整营养状态后减弱，提示其可能反映代谢储备而非直接调控疾病。他汀类药物在临床中不增加ALS风险，但动物实验中效果不一，洛伐他汀可能具有保护作用。
items.insight: 该综述整合了流行病学、遗传学和临床前证据，揭示了胆固醇与ALS之间复杂且非线性的关系，为未来设计针对脂质代谢的ALS干预策略提供了关键背景，并强调了区分旁观者效应与因果作用的重要性。

aiRead.keyFinding: 胆固醇与ALS的关系复杂：高LDL可能增加发病风险，但高脂血症与生存期延长的关联受营养状态影响；他汀类药物临床安全性良好，但动物模型中效果不一，洛伐他汀可能具有保护作用。
aiRead.limitation: 综述基于现有文献，未进行原始数据分析；不同研究间存在异质性，且因果关系仍需进一步验证。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注针对PCSK9抑制剂或特定他汀类药物（如洛伐他汀）在ALS中的临床试验结果，以及结合营养状态调整的脂质生物标志物研究。

items.abstractZh: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）是一种以进行性运动神经元丢失为特征的致命性神经退行性疾病。除了不同的致病机制外，近年来，脂质代谢在ALS发病机制中的作用日益受到关注，尽管脂质改变在ALS中的临床意义可能与其在心血管疾病中已确立的作用不同。本综述通过三个视角批判性地审视了胆固醇与ALS之间的多因素关系：（1）作为疾病发病的风险因素，（2）作为疾病进展的预后生物标志物，以及（3）作为潜在的治疗靶点。流行病学和遗传学研究表明，血脂谱与ALS风险之间存在复杂且有时矛盾的关联。在一些队列中，升高的低密度脂蛋白胆固醇和总胆固醇与疾病易感性增加相关，孟德尔随机化研究支持其潜在的因果作用。相反，关于高密度脂蛋白胆固醇的证据仍然存在矛盾，并可能受到性别特异性和代谢因素的影响。作为预后生物标志物，高脂血症在ALS患者中与延长生存期存在可变关联；然而，在调整体重指数和营养状况后，这些发现往往失去显著性，表明血脂水平可能反映全身代谢储备，而非直接调节疾病进展。胆固醇的药理学调节揭示了进一步的复杂性。虽然临床研究中他汀类药物通常不与ALS风险增加相关，但临床前模型显示出不同的效果：一些他汀类药物加速疾病进展，而另一些如洛伐他汀可能具有保护作用。其他降脂药物，包括贝特类和PCSK9抑制剂，也可能通过降低胆固醇以外的途径影响ALS相关通路，尽管其潜在作用仍有待阐明。
items.frontierRationale: 该综述发表于2026年，系统整合了最新流行病学、孟德尔随机化和临床前研究，直接探讨胆固醇作为ALS治疗靶点的转化价值，为脂质代谢调控在ALS中的临床应用提供了前沿视角。

items.title: The role of SUMOylation in regulating proteins that drive neuronal disease progression.
items.summary: SUMOylation is a post-translational modification in which a Small Ubiquitin-like Modifier (SUMO) protein is reversibly attached to a lysine residue on a target protein in an ATP-dependent process. This modification can affect the function of target proteins by enhancing their stability or changing cellular translocation, thereby making SUMOylation a critical regulator in the pathogenesis of multiple diseases. The functional consequences of SUMOylation, however, are highly context dependent. In Alzheimer's disease, SUMOylation stabilizes proteins that drive disease progression and enhances neurotoxicity, thereby exacerbating these conditions. Similarly, in Progressive Supranuclear Palsy, SUMO-1 conjugation stabilizes truncated tau and blocks its ubiquitination, whereas SUMO-2/3 conjugation promotes Tau clearance and recovery from neuroinflammation, illustrating how distinct SUMO paralogues can exert opposing effects within the same disease. Conversely, increased SUMOylation can be neuroprotective in cerebral ischemia and Parkinson's disease by promoting autophagic clearance of pathogenic proteins. Beyond alterations in protein stability, aberrant SUMOylation can also lead to mis-localization of target proteins, which has been identified as a pathogenic mechanism in disorders such as Huntington's disease and Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis that results in impaired clearance and pathogenic buildup, which results in neuronal death. From a therapeutic standpoint, the SUMO inhibitor TAK-981 has shown promise in both Multiple Sclerosis and in pre-clinical glioblastoma models, underscoring the translational potential of targeting of this pathway. This review examines the multifaceted role of SUMOylation across diverse neurological conditions, evaluates the therapeutic potential of SUMO inhibitors and activators, and highlights the opportunities and challenges of modulating this pathway in currently incurable neurological disorders.
items.titleZh: SUMO化修饰在调控驱动神经元疾病进展的蛋白质中的作用
items.summaryZh: SUMO化修饰通过改变蛋白质稳定性和定位，在多种神经退行性疾病中发挥双重作用：在阿尔茨海默病和进行性核上性麻痹中加剧病理，在脑缺血和帕金森病中具有保护作用。在ALS中，异常SUMO化导致蛋白错误定位和清除障碍。SUMO抑制剂TAK-981在MS和胶质母细胞瘤模型中显示治疗潜力。
items.insight: 该综述系统梳理了SUMO化在ALS等神经退行性疾病中的矛盾角色，为理解蛋白稳态失衡的分子机制提供了新视角，并提示SUMO通路可能成为ALS治疗的新靶点。

aiRead.keyFinding: SUMO化在神经退行性疾病中具有双重作用：在AD和PSP中促进病理，在脑缺血和PD中起保护作用；在ALS中导致蛋白错误定位和清除障碍。
aiRead.limitation: 综述基于现有文献，缺乏直接针对ALS的临床数据，SUMO抑制剂在ALS中的效果尚需验证。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注SUMO抑制剂TAK-981在ALS临床前模型中的进一步验证，以及不同SUMO同源物在ALS中的特异性作用研究。

items.abstractZh: SUMO化是一种翻译后修饰，其中小泛素样修饰蛋白（SUMO）以ATP依赖的方式可逆地连接到靶蛋白的赖氨酸残基上。这种修饰可以通过增强靶蛋白的稳定性或改变其细胞定位来影响其功能，从而使SUMO化成为多种疾病发病机制中的关键调节因子。然而，SUMO化的功能后果高度依赖于具体环境。在阿尔茨海默病中，SUMO化稳定了驱动疾病进展的蛋白质并增强了神经毒性，从而加剧了这些状况。类似地，在进行性核上性麻痹中，SUMO-1结合稳定了截短的tau蛋白并阻断其泛素化，而SUMO-2/3结合则促进tau蛋白清除和神经炎症恢复，说明不同的SUMO同源物在同一疾病中可发挥相反作用。相反，在脑缺血和帕金森病中，增加的SUMO化可通过促进致病蛋白的自噬清除而起到神经保护作用。除了蛋白质稳定性的改变，异常的SUMO化还可导致靶蛋白的错误定位，这已被确定为亨廷顿病和肌萎缩侧索硬化症等疾病的致病机制，导致清除受损和致病性积累，进而导致神经元死亡。从治疗角度来看，SUMO抑制剂TAK-981在多发性硬化症和临床前胶质母细胞瘤模型中显示出前景，强调了靶向该通路的转化潜力。本综述考察了SUMO化在不同神经系统疾病中的多方面作用，评估了SUMO抑制剂和激活剂的治疗潜力，并强调了在目前无法治愈的神经系统疾病中调节该通路的机遇与挑战。
items.frontierRationale: 该综述发表于2026年，系统总结了SUMO化在ALS等神经退行性疾病中的最新进展，并评估了SUMO抑制剂TAK-981的转化潜力，具有高度的ALS相关性和新近性。

items.title: Deletion of exon 2 in ALS-linked Sptlc1 causes lethality in homozygous mice but not in heterozygotes.
items.summary: Mutations in the human SPTLC1 gene have recently been linked to early-onset amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS), characterized by global atrophy, motor impairments, and symptoms such as tongue fasciculations. All known ALS-linked SPTLC1 mutations cluster within exon 2, and a specific variant, c.58G>T, results in exon 2 skipping. However, it is unclear how the exon 2 deletion affects SPTLC1 function in vivo and contributes to ALS pathogenesis. Leveraging the high genomic sequence similarity between mouse and human SPTLC1 , we created a novel knock-in mouse model with a CRISPR/Cas9-mediated deletion of exon 2 in the endogenous murine Sptlc1 locus. Although heterozygous mice did not develop motor defects or ALS-like neuropathology, homozygous mutants died prematurely. These findings provide valuable insights into SPTLC1 exon 2 biology and serve as a useful resource for future mechanistic studies.
items.titleZh: ALS相关Sptlc1基因外显子2缺失导致纯合子小鼠致死，但杂合子小鼠存活
items.summaryZh: 该研究通过CRISPR/Cas9技术构建了Sptlc1外显子2缺失的小鼠模型，发现纯合子小鼠致死，而杂合子小鼠未出现运动或神经病理异常，提示外显子2对生存至关重要，但单拷贝缺失不足以引发ALS样表型。
items.insight: 该研究直接针对ALS相关SPTLC1突变热点（外显子2）进行体内功能验证，明确了外显子2缺失的致死性后果，为理解SPTLC1在ALS发病中的必需功能提供了关键动物模型，值得跟踪其后续机制研究。

aiRead.keyFinding: Sptlc1外显子2缺失导致纯合子小鼠致死，但杂合子小鼠无ALS样表型。
aiRead.limitation: 杂合子小鼠未出现运动缺陷或神经病理改变，无法直接模拟ALS疾病进展；仅关注外显子2缺失，未涵盖其他突变类型。
aiRead.watchNext: 后续应探索外显子2缺失如何影响SPTLC1蛋白功能（如鞘脂代谢），以及是否在人类细胞或更接近ALS的模型中诱导神经退行性表型。

items.abstractZh: 人类SPTLC1基因的突变最近被关联到早发性肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS），其特征为全身性萎缩、运动障碍以及舌肌束颤等症状。所有已知的ALS相关SPTLC1突变均聚集在外显子2内，其中特定变异c.58G>T导致外显子2跳跃。然而，外显子2缺失如何影响SPTLC1在体内的功能并促进ALS发病机制尚不清楚。利用小鼠和人类SPTLC1之间高度相似的基因组序列，我们通过CRISPR/Cas9介导的内源性小鼠Sptlc1位点外显子2缺失，创建了一种新型敲入小鼠模型。尽管杂合子小鼠未出现运动缺陷或ALS样神经病理学改变，但纯合子突变体过早死亡。这些发现为SPTLC1外显子2的生物学功能提供了有价值的见解，并为未来的机制研究提供了有用资源。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究利用最新CRISPR技术构建了ALS相关Sptlc1外显子2缺失小鼠模型，直接关联ALS突变热点，具有明确的ALS转化价值。

items.title: Association of Plasma Neurofilament Light Chain With Diagnostic Classification in a Neuromuscular Referral Cohort: A Cross-Sectional Study.
items.summary: Plasma neurofilament light chain (pNfL) is a blood-based biomarker of axonal injury elevated in several neuromuscular disorders. While previous studies have compared individual diseases with healthy controls, less is known about how pNfL performs across clinically relevant neuromuscular presentations encountered in subspecialty practice, particularly in distinguishing active from inactive neuropathies. We evaluated whether abnormal age-adjusted pNfL concentrations are associated with clinically relevant diagnostic categories and whether pNfL discriminates between active and inactive neuropathies. We conducted a cross-sectional study of patients evaluated by neuromuscular specialists at Mayo Clinic (Rochester, MN) between April 2022 and April 2024, in whom pNfL was ordered as part of routine clinical care. Diagnoses were assigned to prespecified categories by consensus review, including motor neuron disease (MND), active neuropathy, inactive neuropathy, and structural etiologies. Clinically active neuropathy was defined using prespecified, diagnosis-specific operational criteria incorporating treatment status, clinical relapse or progression, time from symptom onset, and pathologic evidence of inflammation. Abnormal pNfL was defined using previously established age-adjusted 97.5th percentile reference limits. Multinomial logistic regression evaluated associations between abnormal pNfL and diagnostic category, adjusting for neuropathy impairment score and symptom duration. Receiver operating characteristic (ROC) analyses assessed discrimination between prespecified groups. Among 306 patients (mean age 62.2 years, 41.5% female), 179 (58.5%) had MND, 28 (9.1%) active neuropathy, 75 (12.1%) inactive neuropathy, and 24 (7.8%) structural etiologies. Median pNfL concentrations differed across diagnostic groups ( p < 0.0001) and were highest in MND and active neuropathy. After adjustment, abnormal pNfL was associated with a higher relative likelihood of classification as MND (relative risk ratio [RRR] 18.47, 95% CI 8.77-38.86) and active neuropathy (RRR 7.30, 95% CI 2.50-21.34) compared with inactive neuropathies. No association was observed with structural etiologies. Discrimination between active and inactive neuropathy was moderate (area under the curve [AUC] 0.79, 95% CI 0.70-0.88), and discrimination for MND vs all other diagnoses was good (AUC 0.85, 95% CI 0.80-0.90). In this cross-sectional cohort, abnormal age-adjusted pNfL concentrations were more frequently observed in diagnostic categories characterized by clinically active axonal injury than in inactive neuropathies and structural conditions. These findings suggest a potential role for pNfL as an adjunctive tool in neuromuscular diagnostic evaluation. Interpretation is limited by the cross-sectional design and convenience sampling. This study provides Class II evidence that abnormal age-adjusted pNfL distinguishes active neuropathies from inactive neuropathies with moderate diagnostic accuracy.
items.titleZh: 血浆神经丝轻链与神经肌肉转诊队列中诊断分类的关联：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面研究在神经肌肉转诊队列中评估了血浆NfL（pNfL）的诊断价值。结果显示，年龄校正后的异常pNfL浓度在运动神经元病（包括ALS）和活动性神经病变患者中显著升高，能较好地区分活动性与非活动性神经病变（AUC 0.79），并能良好区分MND与其他诊断（AUC 0.85）。这表明pNfL可作为神经肌肉疾病诊断评估的辅助工具。
items.insight: 该研究直接验证了pNfL在真实临床转诊环境中的诊断区分能力，特别是区分活动性轴突损伤（如ALS）与非活动性病变，为pNfL作为ALS等神经肌肉疾病临床辅助诊断标志物提供了真实世界证据。

aiRead.keyFinding: 年龄校正后的异常pNfL浓度在运动神经元病（MND）和活动性神经病变中显著升高，能中等至良好地区分活动性与非活动性神经病变（AUC 0.79）以及MND与其他诊断（AUC 0.85）。
aiRead.limitation: 横断面设计无法推断因果关系；便利抽样可能引入选择偏倚；样本量相对有限，且来自单一转诊中心。
aiRead.watchNext: 后续应关注纵向研究，评估pNfL在ALS等疾病进展和预后中的动态变化，以及其在多中心队列中的验证结果。

items.abstractZh: 血浆神经丝轻链（pNfL）是一种基于血液的轴突损伤生物标志物，在多种神经肌肉疾病中升高。虽然既往研究已将个别疾病与健康对照进行比较，但关于pNfL在亚专科实践中遇到的临床相关神经肌肉表现中的表现，尤其是在区分活动性与非活动性神经病变方面的表现，所知甚少。我们评估了异常的年龄校正pNfL浓度是否与临床相关的诊断类别相关，以及pNfL是否能区分活动性和非活动性神经病变。我们进行了一项横断面研究，对象为2022年4月至2024年4月期间在梅奥诊所（明尼苏达州罗切斯特）由神经肌肉专家评估的患者，这些患者作为常规临床护理的一部分接受了pNfL检测。通过共识审查将诊断分配到预设类别，包括运动神经元病（MND）、活动性神经病变、非活动性神经病变和结构性病因。临床活动性神经病变使用预设的、诊断特异性的操作标准定义，这些标准结合了治疗状态、临床复发或进展、症状发作时间以及炎症的病理学证据。异常pNfL使用先前建立的年龄校正的第97.5百分位参考限值定义。多项逻辑回归评估了异常pNfL与诊断类别之间的关联，并调整了神经病变损伤评分和症状持续时间。受试者工作特征（ROC）分析评估了预设组之间的区分能力。在306名患者（平均年龄62.2岁，41.5%为女性）中，179名（58.5%）患有MND，28名（9.1%）患有活动性神经病变，75名（12.1%）患有非活动性神经病变，24名（7.8%）患有结构性病因。不同诊断组的中位pNfL浓度存在差异（p < 0.0001），且在MND和活动性神经病变中最高。调整后，与非活动性神经病变相比，异常pNfL与分类为MND（相对风险比[RRR] 18.47，95% CI 8.77-38.86）和活动性神经病变（RRR 7.30，95% CI 2.50-21.34）的相对可能性较高相关。未观察到与结构性病因的关联。活动性与非活动性神经病变之间的区分能力中等（曲线下面积[AUC] 0.79，95% CI 0.70-0.88），而MND与所有其他诊断的区分能力良好（AUC 0.85，95% CI 0.80-0.90）。在这个横断面队列中，异常的年龄校正pNfL浓度在临床活动性轴突损伤特征的诊断类别中比在非活动性神经病变和结构性病变中更常见。这些发现提示pNfL作为神经肌肉诊断评估辅助工具的潜在作用。解释受到横断面设计和便利抽样的限制。本研究提供了II类证据，表明异常的年龄校正pNfL以中等诊断准确性区分活动性神经病变与非活动性神经病变。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究具有新近性（2026年发表）和ALS相关性，直接评估了pNfL在神经肌肉转诊队列中的诊断分类价值，为pNfL作为临床辅助工具提供了真实世界证据。

items.title: Neurology ® Journal Club: Duration of Current Statin Use and Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis Risk.
items.summary: This article critically appraises the study by Nakken et al., "Duration of Current Statin Use and Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (ALS) Risk." Previous observational studies and Mendelian randomization studies examining statin use and ALS risk have reported mixed results. Millions of adults receive statins for cardiovascular prevention and may be concerned when neuromuscular symptoms suggestive of ALS appear. Using linked nationwide health survey and prescription data, this Norwegian population-based cohort study applied time-dependent models to evaluate statin use and subsequent ALS risk. Short-term statin use was associated with increased ALS risk, whereas long-term use was associated with lower risk. The authors interpreted this as evidence of reverse causation rather than a causal or protective effect of statins. Key strengths of the study include its large population-based design, the use of a negative control, and time-dependent Cox modeling. However, limitations inherent to observational study designs and potential residual confounding should be considered. In this article, we summarize the findings, highlight key statistical concepts, and discuss the study's major strengths and limitations.
items.titleZh: 神经病学杂志俱乐部：当前他汀类药物使用持续时间与肌萎缩侧索硬化风险
items.summaryZh: 挪威一项大型人群队列研究显示，短期他汀类药物使用与ALS风险升高相关，而长期使用则与风险降低相关。作者认为这更可能是反向因果关系（即早期ALS症状导致他汀使用），而非他汀的保护作用。研究采用时间依赖模型和阴性对照，但观察性设计仍存在残余混杂。
items.insight: 该研究为ALS研究者提供了关于他汀类药物与ALS风险关系的流行病学证据，特别是通过时间依赖模型区分了短期与长期使用的不同关联，并强调了反向因果解释的重要性。这有助于指导临床医生在患者出现神经肌肉症状时合理解读他汀类药物的风险。

aiRead.studyType: 观察性队列研究（Journal Club评论）
aiRead.keyFinding: 短期他汀使用与ALS风险增加相关，长期使用与风险降低相关，但可能源于反向因果。
aiRead.limitation: 观察性设计，残余混杂因素无法完全排除；Journal Club文章本身为二次评论，非原始数据。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注孟德尔随机化研究或更严格的因果推断方法（如工具变量分析）来验证他汀与ALS的因果关系。

items.abstractZh: 本文对Nakken等人的研究“当前他汀类药物使用持续时间与肌萎缩侧索硬化（ALS）风险”进行了批判性评估。既往观察性研究和孟德尔随机化研究关于他汀类药物使用与ALS风险的关系报告了不一致的结果。数百万成年人因心血管预防服用他汀类药物，当出现提示ALS的神经肌肉症状时可能感到担忧。这项基于挪威全国健康调查和处方数据的队列研究，采用时间依赖模型评估了他汀类药物使用与后续ALS风险。短期他汀类药物使用与ALS风险增加相关，而长期使用与较低风险相关。作者将其解释为反向因果关系的证据，而非他汀类药物的因果或保护作用。该研究的主要优势包括其大型人群基础设计、阴性对照的使用以及时间依赖Cox模型。然而，应考虑观察性研究设计固有的局限性及潜在的残余混杂因素。本文总结了研究结果，强调了关键统计概念，并讨论了研究的主要优势和局限性。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究基于2026年最新发表的挪威全国队列数据，直接关联他汀类药物这一广泛使用的药物与ALS风险，具有重要的临床转化价值。

items.source: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation
items.title: Interventional Procedures for Musculoskeletal Pain in ALS Patients: A Case Series.
items.summary: Many patients with amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) experience musculoskeletal pain, yet data on the safety and efficacy of interventional procedures for pain relief in this population are limited. This study aims to describe the characteristics, outcomes, and procedural considerations of pain interventions performed for musculoskeletal pain in ALS patients. A retrospective chart review was conducted of ALS patients referred for interventional pain management by a neuromuscular physiatrist at a single academic institution's interdisciplinary ALS Center between February 2021 and February 2025. Eleven patients (mean age: 57 y, 64% male) underwent 14 procedures. Shoulder pain was the most common indication (43%), followed by spine (29%) and hip (14%) pain. Procedures mostly consisted of joint and bursal injections peripherally and of epidural injections in the axial spine. Overall, 13 of 14 (93%) procedures provided at least "good" pain relief, and 5 patients elected to repeat their procedures. One patient experienced transient postprocedure hypertension; no major complications occurred. Interventional procedures, particularly corticosteroid injections, appear to be safe and effective for managing focal musculoskeletal pain in patients with ALS. Tailored procedural techniques and multidisciplinary coordination can enhance comfort and optimize outcomes in this complex population.
items.titleZh: ALS患者肌肉骨骼疼痛的介入治疗：一项病例系列研究
items.summaryZh: 这项回顾性病例系列研究显示，对ALS患者进行皮质类固醇注射等介入疼痛治疗，93%的手术提供了至少“良好”的疼痛缓解，且未出现重大并发症，表明该方法安全有效。
items.insight: ALS患者的疼痛管理常被忽视，该研究提供了介入治疗在ALS人群中安全性和有效性的初步证据，为临床实践中的疼痛管理策略提供了参考。

aiRead.keyFinding: 介入疼痛治疗（主要为皮质类固醇注射）在ALS患者中安全有效，93%的手术提供良好疼痛缓解。
aiRead.limitation: 样本量小（11名患者），回顾性设计，缺乏对照组，可能限制结果的普适性。
aiRead.watchNext: 需要更大规模的前瞻性研究或随机对照试验来验证这些发现，并探索不同介入技术的长期效果。

items.abstractZh: 许多肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）患者经历肌肉骨骼疼痛，但关于介入治疗在该人群中缓解疼痛的安全性和有效性的数据有限。本研究旨在描述ALS患者因肌肉骨骼疼痛接受疼痛介入治疗的特征、结局和操作注意事项。对2021年2月至2025年2月期间，由一家学术机构的跨学科ALS中心的一名神经肌肉康复医师转诊接受介入疼痛管理的ALS患者进行了回顾性病历审查。11名患者（平均年龄：57岁，64%为男性）接受了14次手术。肩部疼痛是最常见的适应症（43%），其次是脊柱（29%）和髋部（14%）疼痛。手术主要包括外周关节和滑囊注射以及中轴脊柱的硬膜外注射。总体而言，14次手术中有13次（93%）提供了至少“良好”的疼痛缓解，5名患者选择重复手术。一名患者出现短暂术后高血压；未发生重大并发症。介入治疗，特别是皮质类固醇注射，对于管理ALS患者的局灶性肌肉骨骼疼痛似乎是安全有效的。量身定制的手术技术和多学科协调可以增强该复杂人群的舒适度并优化结局。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究基于2021-2025年的近期数据，直接针对ALS患者疼痛管理的临床需求，具有ALS相关性。

items.title: Preparing Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis Clinics to Provide Longitudinal Care for Individuals Carrying ALS Risk Variants.
items.summary: Emerging genetic therapies and the expansion of genetic testing are identifying individuals carrying amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) risk variants who would benefit from surveillance and early intervention. Anticipating the geographic distribution and clinical needs of this population is essential for optimizing care delivery and ensuring readiness as new therapies become available. We estimate the number of individuals in the United States carrying ALS risk variants and project the clinical engagement required to support this population. This is especially timely because ALS clinics are already grappling with rising numbers of patients with symptomatic ALS and deep funding cuts. We developed a population model to estimate the number of symptomatic individuals with gene-positive ALS and asymptomatic gene carriers across US states over the next decade (year 1: 2026). State-level ALS prevalence and incidence were calculated using 2 approaches: (1) race-adjusted ALS rates from the Atlanta metropolitan study applied to 2023 Census demographics and (2) observed state-level ALS case counts from the National ALS Registry (2011-2018). Gene-positive cases were estimated using published frequencies of SOD1 , C9orf72 , FUS , and TARDBP pathogenic variants. At-risk relatives were modeled assuming autosomal-dominant inheritance with ∼5 first-degree and ∼7 second-degree living relatives per proband, and broad uptake of cascade genetic testing. Surveillance needs were modeled as 1 annual visit per asymptomatic carrier, which was normalized by the number of ALS centers per state. In year 1 (2026), the model estimated 2,704 symptomatic gene-positive ALS carriers. With an average of 4.25 carrier relatives per proband, 10,944 asymptomatic carriers were projected nationwide. Most states required <50 additional visits per clinic annually, with 12 states in the 50-99 range and none exceeding 100. By year 10 (2035), the model projected 7,474 symptomatic and 26,111 asymptomatic carriers. State-level demand shifted substantially: only 6 states remained below 50 visits per clinic annually; 22 reached 50-99; 18 reached 100-199; and 3 exceeded 200. Gene-targeted testing is projected to substantially increase ALS clinic visits among asymptomatic gene carriers. While current infrastructure may accommodate the initial rise, within a decade, most states will require significant expansion. Anticipating and planning for this growth now is essential to ensure seamless integration of gene-positive individuals into ALS care.
items.titleZh: 准备肌萎缩侧索硬化症诊所，为携带ALS风险变异个体提供纵向护理
items.summaryZh: 该研究通过人口模型预测，随着基因检测普及，美国无症状ALS风险基因携带者数量将在10年内从约1.1万增至2.6万，导致大多数州ALS诊所就诊需求显著增加，需提前规划基础设施扩展。
items.insight: 该研究首次系统量化了基因检测扩大对ALS诊所工作量的影响，为卫生系统提前规划资源分配提供了关键数据，对ALS预防性护理的落地具有重要指导意义。

aiRead.keyFinding: 到2035年，美国无症状ALS基因携带者数量将达2.6万，多数州ALS诊所年就诊量需增加100次以上。
aiRead.limitation: 模型依赖假设（如级联检测普及率、遗传模式），且未考虑基因治疗对携带者自然史的影响。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注真实世界级联检测实施数据及ALS诊所容量扩展的试点项目。

items.abstractZh: 新兴的基因治疗和基因检测的扩展正在识别携带肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）风险变异的个体，这些人将从监测和早期干预中受益。预测这一人群的地理分布和临床需求对于优化护理提供和确保在新疗法可用时做好准备至关重要。我们估算了美国携带ALS风险变异的人数，并预测了支持这一人群所需的临床参与。这尤其及时，因为ALS诊所已经在应对症状性ALS患者数量增加和资金大幅削减的问题。我们开发了一个人口模型，以估算未来十年（第1年：2026年）美国各州基因阳性症状性ALS患者和无症状基因携带者的数量。州级ALS患病率和发病率通过两种方法计算：（1）将亚特兰大都市研究的种族调整ALS率应用于2023年人口普查人口统计数据；（2）来自国家ALS登记处（2011-2018年）的观察到的州级ALS病例数。基因阳性病例使用SOD1、C9orf72、FUS和TARDBP致病性变异的已发表频率进行估算。风险亲属的建模假设常染色体显性遗传，每个先证者约有5名一级和约7名二级在世亲属，并广泛采用级联基因检测。监测需求建模为每位无症状携带者每年一次就诊，并按各州ALS中心数量进行标准化。在第1年（2026年），模型估计有2,704名基因阳性症状性ALS携带者。每个先证者平均有4.25名携带者亲属，全国范围内预计有10,944名无症状携带者。大多数州每个诊所每年需要少于50次额外就诊，12个州在50-99次范围内，没有州超过100次。到第10年（2035年），模型预测有7,474名症状性携带者和26,111名无症状携带者。州级需求显著变化：只有6个州每个诊所每年就诊次数低于50次；22个州达到50-99次；18个州达到100-199次；3个州超过200次。基因靶向检测预计将显著增加无症状基因携带者的ALS诊所就诊次数。虽然当前基础设施可能适应初始增长，但在十年内，大多数州将需要显著扩展。现在预测和规划这一增长对于确保基因阳性个体无缝融入ALS护理至关重要。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究基于2026年最新人口模型，直接关联ALS基因携带者的临床护理需求，具有高度ALS相关性和转化价值。

items.title: The impedance mismatch theory: A non-equilibrium thermodynamic framework for a shared energetic stress pathway in neurodegeneration.
items.summary: Current neurobiological models of Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (ALS), Multiple Sclerosis (MS), and Huntington's Disease (HD) utilize multi-omic interactome analyses to map cascades of proteinopathy. While essential, these approaches often overlook the macroscopic thermodynamic limits of the neural substrate as an information processing system. We propose the Impedance Mismatch Theory, a theoretical biophysical model and quantitative framework for the thermodynamic limits of neural computation, positing that these distinct pathologies converge as a shared energetic stress pathway. We introduce the Neurophysiological Load Index (NLI)-a dimensionless parameter quantifying the mismatch between electrical computational drive, topological network impedance, and the local structural and microvascular dissipation capacity. Drawing on the Pennes Bioheat Transfer Equation and insights from multiplex network theory, we hypothesize that pathology initiates as localized thermal runaway, where resistive metabolic heat exceeds convective blood perfusion and thermal conduction, inducing acute decompensation. We outline cross-translational disease-network mechanisms, address the inverse cancer comorbidity paradox via speculative bioelectric attractor states, and propose falsifiable predictions involving high-resolution in vivo proton magnetic resonance spectroscopy thermometry ( 1 H-MRS-t) and phosphorus-31 magnetic resonance spectroscopy ( 31 P-MRS).
items.titleZh: 阻抗失配理论：神经退行性疾病中共享能量应激通路的非平衡热力学框架
items.summaryZh: 该理论提出ALS、MS和HD等不同神经退行性疾病可能共享一个由能量代谢失衡驱动的共同病理通路，并引入了一个新的量化指标（神经生理负荷指数，NLI）来评估神经计算过程中的热力学失配。
items.insight: 该理论为ALS研究者提供了一个全新的视角，将疾病机制从传统的蛋白质聚集和分子通路扩展到宏观热力学和能量代谢层面，可能解释为何不同神经退行性疾病存在共同的代谢脆弱性，并为开发基于能量稳态的干预策略提供理论基础。

aiRead.keyFinding: 提出了阻抗失配理论，认为神经退行性疾病的共同基础是神经计算过程中的热力学能量失配，并引入神经生理负荷指数（NLI）作为量化工具。
aiRead.limitation: 该理论目前仅为假说模型，缺乏直接的实验验证数据，其核心预测（如局部热失控）仍需通过高分辨率磁共振波谱等技术在活体中进行检验。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注后续是否出现利用1H-MRS-t或31P-MRS在ALS患者中验证局部热失控和能量代谢异常的实验研究。

items.abstractZh: 当前肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）、多发性硬化症（MS）和亨廷顿病（HD）的神经生物学模型利用多组学相互作用组分析来绘制蛋白质病变的级联反应。虽然这些方法至关重要，但它们常常忽视了作为信息处理系统的神经基质的宏观热力学极限。我们提出了阻抗失配理论，这是一个关于神经计算热力学极限的理论生物物理模型和定量框架，认为这些不同的病理学汇聚为一条共享的能量应激通路。我们引入了神经生理负荷指数（NLI）——一个无量纲参数，用于量化电计算驱动力、拓扑网络阻抗以及局部结构和微血管耗散能力之间的失配。借鉴Pennes生物热传递方程和多层网络理论的见解，我们假设病理学起始于局部热失控，其中电阻性代谢热超过对流血液灌注和热传导，诱发急性失代偿。我们概述了跨转化疾病网络机制，通过推测性的生物电吸引子状态解决了癌症共病悖论，并提出了涉及高分辨率体内质子磁共振波谱测温（1H-MRS-t）和磷-31磁共振波谱（31P-MRS）的可证伪预测。
items.frontierRationale: 该理论发表于2026年，首次将非平衡热力学框架系统性地应用于ALS等神经退行性疾病的共享能量应激通路，具有高度的理论前沿性和跨疾病转化价值。

items.title: Patient-Reported Symptom Burden in Individuals With Parkinson Disease.
items.summary: To better understand Parkinson disease (PD) burden and advance the clinical management of patients, it is important to ascertain the most significant symptoms directly from individuals with PD. This research used patient-reported data to identify the most prevalent and impactful symptoms experienced by individuals with PD and determine the demographic and clinical characteristics that are associated with higher symptomatic burden. We conducted semistructured qualitative interviews of 20 individuals with self-reported PD, obtaining 2,978 quotes regarding potential symptoms of importance. Findings from these interviews informed the development of a cross-sectional survey study designed to asess the impact of these symptoms in a larger cohort. Four-hundred four participants with self-reported PD participated in the survey study, providing the prevalence and relative importance (0-4 scale) of 301 symptoms representing 14 symptomatic themes. We subsequently performed subgroup analysis to identify demographic and clinical characteristics that were associated with a higher prevalence of symptomatic burden in PD. The most prevalent symptomatic themes identified by participants were sleep disturbances and daytime sleepiness (87.0%) and fatigue (84.7%). The symptomatic themes with the greatest impact (0-4) on participants' lives were fatigue (1.34) and sleep disturbances and daytime sleepiness (1.29). A higher prevalence of disease burden across all symptomatic themes was most strongly associated with speech impairment, gait freezing, and a duration of tremor greater than 5 years. The impact of PD on the lives of those living with this disease is multisystemic, reaching beyond the cardinal motor symptoms. Fatigue, sleep disturbances, and daytime sleepiness are highly prevalent and important to this population.
items.titleZh: 帕金森病患者报告的症状负担
items.summaryZh: 该研究通过患者报告数据，发现帕金森病患者最普遍且影响最大的症状是疲劳、睡眠障碍和白天嗜睡，而非传统运动症状。这些非运动症状的负担与言语障碍、步态冻结和长期震颤密切相关。
items.insight: 该研究强调非运动症状（如疲劳和睡眠障碍）在帕金森病中的核心地位，提示ALS研究也应关注患者报告的非运动症状负担，以更全面地评估疾病影响和改善临床管理。

aiRead.studyType: 横断面调查研究结合定性访谈
aiRead.keyFinding: 帕金森病患者最普遍且影响最大的症状是疲劳和睡眠障碍，而非运动症状；这些症状负担与言语障碍、步态冻结和长期震颤相关。
aiRead.limitation: 样本为自我报告患者，可能存在回忆偏倚；未纳入客观临床评估；结果仅适用于帕金森病，需谨慎推广至ALS。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注ALS患者中类似非运动症状（如疲劳、睡眠障碍）的患者报告研究，以及这些症状与疾病进展的关系。

items.abstractZh: 为了更好地理解帕金森病（PD）的负担并推进患者的临床管理，直接从PD患者那里获取最重要的症状至关重要。本研究使用患者报告的数据，识别PD患者经历的最普遍和影响最大的症状，并确定与较高症状负担相关的人口学和临床特征。我们对20名自我报告患有PD的个体进行了半结构化定性访谈，获得了2978条关于潜在重要症状的引述。这些访谈结果指导了一项横断面调查研究的设计，旨在评估这些症状在更大队列中的影响。404名自我报告患有PD的参与者参与了调查研究，提供了代表14个症状主题的301种症状的患病率和相对重要性（0-4分）。随后我们进行了亚组分析，以确定与PD症状负担较高患病率相关的人口学和临床特征。参与者识别的最普遍症状主题是睡眠障碍和白天嗜睡（87.0%）以及疲劳（84.7%）。对参与者生活影响最大（0-4分）的症状主题是疲劳（1.34）和睡眠障碍及白天嗜睡（1.29）。所有症状主题中疾病负担的较高患病率与言语障碍、步态冻结和震颤持续时间超过5年最强相关。PD对患者生活的影响是多系统的，超出了核心运动症状。疲劳、睡眠障碍和白天嗜睡在该人群中非常普遍且重要。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究基于2026年最新患者报告数据，揭示了帕金森病中非运动症状的普遍性和重要性，对ALS等神经退行性疾病的症状管理具有转化价值。

items.title: Role of the Upper Motor Neuron in the Generation of Fasciculations in Early Disease Stages of Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis.
items.summary: The origin of fasciculation potentials (FPs) in the early stages of amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) remains a subject of debate. We investigated the role of the motor cortex in FP generation by comparing resting FP frequency in the first dorsal interosseous (FDI) muscle before and after motor cortex inhibition induced by continuous theta-burst stimulation (cTBS). We studied patients with early-stage ALS (G1) and a disease-control group (G2) comprising individuals with chronic lower motor neuron (LMN) disorders or benign fasciculation syndrome without upper motor neuron (UMN) involvement. Inclusion required a right FDI strength of MRC grade 4+ or 5. At baseline, we recorded FP frequency and amplitude in the right FDI (3 replicates) and the motor evoked potential (MEP) amplitude. These measures were repeated immediately after cTBS-induced corticomotor inhibition. Statistical significance was set at p < 0.05. Twenty-two patients with ALS (14 men; median age 65.5 years; 72.7% spinal onset) were included, with a median disease duration of 6.4 months and a mean ALSFRS-R score of 44. The control group (G2) consisted of 11 participants. Notably, 50% of the ALS cohort showed no neurogenic features on needle EMG of the right FDI at enrollment. Baseline peripheral and cortical amplitudes and left hemisphere motor thresholds were comparable between groups. After cTBS, MEP amplitudes decreased significantly in both G1 (0.93 vs 0.50 mV, p = 0.02) and G2 (1.23 vs 0.38 mV, p = 0.02). However, a significant reduction in FP frequency (39.5%) occurred only in the ALS group (0.43 vs 0.26 Hz, p < 0.001), whereas no change was observed in G2 (0.60 vs 0.77 Hz, p = 0.14). Patients with ALS with a normal FDI EMG demonstrated an even greater reduction in FP frequency (54.5%). FP amplitudes remained stable across both groups after cTBS. Our findings indicate that in early ALS, LMN excitability is significantly modulated by descending corticospinal input. The reduction in FP frequency after cortical inhibition suggests that FPs in early ALS are driven by a combination of both UMN and LMN hyperexcitability, distinguishing them from fasciculations in other neurogenic disorders.
items.titleZh: 上运动神经元在肌萎缩侧索硬化早期阶段肌束震颤产生中的作用
items.summaryZh: 这项研究通过经颅磁刺激抑制运动皮层，发现早期ALS患者的肌束震颤频率显著下降（约40%），而仅有下运动神经元病变的患者无此变化。这表明早期ALS的肌束震颤不仅源于下运动神经元，还受到上运动神经元过度兴奋的驱动。
items.insight: 该研究直接证明了上运动神经元在ALS早期肌束震颤产生中的关键作用，挑战了传统认为肌束震颤仅源于下运动神经元的观点，为理解ALS病理生理机制和开发针对上运动神经元过度兴奋的治疗策略提供了新依据。

aiRead.keyFinding: 抑制运动皮层后，早期ALS患者的肌束震颤频率显著降低（39.5%），而仅有下运动神经元病变的对照组无变化，表明上运动神经元过度兴奋是早期ALS肌束震颤的重要来源。
aiRead.limitation: 样本量较小（ALS组22例，对照组11例），且仅评估了单一肌肉（第一背侧骨间肌），结果可能不适用于其他肌肉或更晚期的ALS患者。
aiRead.watchNext: 后续研究应扩大样本量，评估不同肌肉和疾病阶段的肌束震颤对上运动神经元抑制的反应，并探索针对上运动神经元过度兴奋的治疗干预（如经颅磁刺激或药物）是否能延缓疾病进展。

items.abstractZh: 肌萎缩侧索硬化（ALS）早期阶段肌束震颤电位（FPs）的起源仍存在争议。我们通过比较连续θ爆发刺激（cTBS）抑制运动皮层前后第一背侧骨间肌（FDI）的静息FP频率，研究了运动皮层在FP产生中的作用。研究对象包括早期ALS患者（G1）和一个疾病对照组（G2），后者由慢性下运动神经元（LMN）疾病或无上运动神经元（UMN）受累的良性肌束震颤综合征患者组成。纳入标准要求右侧FDI肌力为MRC 4+或5级。基线时，我们记录了右侧FDI的FP频率和振幅（3次重复）以及运动诱发电位（MEP）振幅。在cTBS诱导的皮质运动抑制后立即重复这些测量。统计显著性设为p < 0.05。共纳入22例ALS患者（14名男性；中位年龄65.5岁；72.7%为脊髓起病），中位病程6.4个月，平均ALSFRS-R评分为44。对照组（G2）由11名参与者组成。值得注意的是，50%的ALS队列在入组时右侧FDI的针极肌电图未显示神经源性特征。两组之间的基线外周和皮质振幅以及左半球运动阈值相当。cTBS后，G1（0.93 vs 0.50 mV，p = 0.02）和G2（1.23 vs 0.38 mV，p = 0.02）的MEP振幅均显著下降。然而，仅在ALS组中观察到FP频率显著降低（39.5%）（0.43 vs 0.26 Hz，p < 0.001），而G2中未见变化（0.60 vs 0.77 Hz，p = 0.14）。FDI肌电图正常的ALS患者FP频率降低更为显著（54.5%）。cTBS后两组FP振幅保持稳定。我们的研究结果表明，在早期ALS中，LMN兴奋性受到下行皮质脊髓输入的显著调节。皮质抑制后FP频率的降低提示，早期ALS中的FPs是由UMN和LMN过度兴奋共同驱动的，这使其与其他神经源性疾病中的肌束震颤有所区别。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究发表于2026年，首次通过直接抑制运动皮层证实了上运动神经元在ALS早期肌束震颤中的驱动作用，具有高度的ALS机制相关性。
